semantic_matched_intents.quote: No comments on self-evident code; add comments only when logic is non-obvious.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes comments only when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No docstrings / JSDoc unless already present in that section.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings or multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Minimal abstractions: prefer three clear lines over a premature helper function.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids adding abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Comments are crisp: state *why* in one line, not *what* the code already shows.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes why-not-what comments by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not write essays.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings or multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: A code comment (`//` or `///` `<summary>`) is **one or two lines**.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings or multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: If you need a paragraph of rationale, it belongs in the commit message or PR description, not in source.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings or multi-line comment blocks in comments and focuses commit messages on WHY by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never narrate the change ("previously we did X, now Y because...") — that is commit-message content.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already focuses commit messages on WHY by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: enter plan mode to design a detailed implementation plan before non-trivial work.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans approach before implementation on non-trivial work by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No emojis and no AI attribution in commits, PRs, or code.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not use emojis unless asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Resolve root cause; do not paper over.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not commit .env or any secrets.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already never commits secrets by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: If any of these commands fail, FIX the issues before committing.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already never commits broken code.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: DO NOT push code that fails lint checks. This is a blocking requirement.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already never commits broken code.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Fix the root cause, not just the symptoms
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Verify the fix works before committing
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already never commits broken code.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Commit messages: imperative subject under 72 chars, blank line, body explaining *why* not *what*.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes why-not-what commit messages by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Preserve all commits so the per-PR decision trail and RFC history stay on `main`.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already creates new commits rather than amending by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Concision in chat, thoroughness in written artifacts (specs, docs, RFCs).
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 只为复杂逻辑添加注释
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes comments only when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 不需要 JSDoc（除非发布 npm 包）
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings or multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: ❌ 坏注释（重复代码）
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does in comments by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: feat(core): add provider management
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already uses imperative-mood summaries in commit messages by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 小步提交：每个功能完成后立即提交
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as done and does not batch, implying small, frequent commits.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 不要累积：不要等多个功能完成后一起提交
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as done and does not batch, implying small, frequent commits.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 实用主义：解决当前问题，不为未来过度设计
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 直接硬编码：2 个工具不需要抽象层
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: 如果发现自己在写复杂的抽象层、工厂模式、策略模式，或者引入被拒绝的依赖，立即停止，重新阅读设计文档。这个工具的本质是"文件内容替换器"，不是企业级框架。
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Claude does not waste time on niceties such as 'great question'
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids preamble greetings by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Comment the *why* of subtle choices.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: デバッグ思考
